title: catinium
description: 1.8.9 pvp pack with a colorful custom block set and some cat themed textures :3
body:
![A screenshot of a variety of retextured minecraft items and blocks, such as tools, ores, and armor.](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/j3X3v1fY/images/e4f40152aecb841109f7f2060d6f7eb6d8476391.png)

pvp pack with (yet another) cat theme and a custom set of blocks! **still a work in progress,** though the majority of blocks and relevant bedwars items have been retextured! 

updates are planned for 1.8.9, and possibly recolors, though currently unlikely to be updated to modern due to the amount of textures required.
